name: Check Into Cash
description_short: Check Into Cash is located at 3929 Taylorsville Rd, Louisville, KY 40220 in the Hikes Point neighborhood. Google reviewers rate the branch 4.8 stars across 215 reviews. Call +1 502-451-6412.
description_long:
Check Into Cash is one of the largest payday lending chains in the United States, founded over 30 years ago and operating more than 1,000 retail locations nationwide. The Ferndale, Michigan store at 749 East 9 Mile Road serves local customers with short-term loan products and a range of ancillary financial services. As a state-licensed lender, the company operates under Michigan-specific regulations that govern loan amounts, fees, and terms.

At the Ferndale location, the primary product is the Michigan Payday Loan of up to $600, available both in-store and online. Supporting financial services at this store include check cashing, bill payment, Western Union money transfers, and Green Dot Visa Debit Cards. The broader Check Into Cash national platform also offers installment loans, title loans, and a Flex Line of Credit, though availability varies by state. To apply, borrowers need a Social Security number, government-issued photo ID, proof of income, and an active checking account with routing number.

The Ferndale store distinguishes itself with extended weekday hours — open until 7pm Monday through Friday, with an early 8am Friday opening — offering flexibility for working customers. The company emphasizes speed and confidentiality, advertising that approved applicants can walk out with cash in hand the same day. The combination of loan products alongside check cashing, bill pay, and money transfer services makes it a multi-function financial services outlet for consumers who may not have full access to traditional banking. Check Into Cash also maintains a state license and retail fee schedule publicly disclosed for Michigan customers.

Check Into Cash serves a real need for consumers facing urgent, small-dollar financial shortfalls who lack access to conventional credit. However, payday loans are among the most expensive forms of short-term borrowing available, typically carrying triple-digit annualized percentage rates even when capped by state law. Michigan limits payday loan amounts to $600 but fees can still be substantial relative to the amount borrowed. Borrowers who cannot repay in full on their next pay date risk rollover fees that compound the cost significantly. This product is best treated as a true last resort after exhausting lower-cost alternatives such as employer advances, credit union payday alternative loans, or non-profit assistance programs.
pros: Payday loans available both in-store and online for Michigan residents
Same-day cash disbursement for approved in-store applicants
Extended hours — open until 7pm weekdays, 8am opening on Fridays
State-licensed lender with publicly disclosed Michigan fee schedule
Multiple financial services in one location: Western Union, bill pay, Green Dot cards
Over 30 years of operation with established compliance infrastructure
Walk-in availability with no appointment required
cons: Payday loan capped at $600 in Michigan — insufficient for larger emergencies
Rates and fees are not disclosed on the local store page; customers must visit or call
Requires an active checking account, excluding fully unbanked consumers from loan products
Closed Sundays, limiting access for weekend emergencies
Payday loans carry high fees that can spiral if rolled over or not repaid on the due date
best_for: Michigan residents needing small emergency cash before their next paycheck
Consumers who want same-day in-store loan funding without a bank appointment
People needing a combination of check cashing, bill pay, and money transfer services in one stop
Borrowers with limited or poor credit who cannot qualify for traditional bank loans
diagnosis: Check Into Cash is best suited for Michigan consumers who need a small amount of cash urgently before their next paycheck and have no access to lower-cost credit options. The Ferndale store offers same-day funding, extended hours, and bundled financial services, but the main caveat is that payday loan fees translate to very high effective APRs, and failure to repay on the due date can trigger costly rollovers.
services: Payday Loans (up to $600, in-store and online)
Flex Line of Credit (availability varies by state)
In-store cash disbursement same day upon approval
